skills.name: monitoring
skills.description: Comprehensive Grafana, Prometheus & Alertmanager operations for Devo monitoring infrastructure. Includes: creating/managing alert silences across multiple clusters, troubleshooting 'silence not working' scenarios, handling in-flight alerts, multi-cluster silence deployment, verifying silence effectiveness, understanding alert timing, dealing with external Grafana instances, alert name variants, and complete Prometheus/Alertmanager troubleshooting. Use for: viewing dashboards, creating alert silences, checking metrics, multi-cluster operations, debugging alert delivery issues.
